headline: Martin Marietta Materials (MLM) Stock Sees Modest Fair Value Cut As Analysts Trim Assumptions
summary: Martin Marietta Materials is back in focus after analysts trimmed their fair value estimate from US$700.04 to US$683.09, a modest reset that has caught many investors’ attention. This shift aligns with recent research that balances confidence in the core aggregates business with caution around valuation and macro sensitivities that can influence construction activity. As you read on, you will see how this updated price target fits into the broader analyst narrative and how to keep track of...

headline: Martin Marietta CEO on Lhoist North America deal: This make us the leader in lime across the U.S.
summary: Martin Marietta chair and CEO Ward Nye joins 'Squawk on the Street' to discuss the company's stock performance, their deal to buy Lhoist North America and more.
